cluster.title: Auth & Identity end-to-end
cluster.summary: End-to-end identity flow: six login ramps (dev IdP, Google OAuth, SIWE wallet/local-key, password/magic-link, SAML, API keys) all converge on one compact HMAC bearer verified by the facade, touched against backend session rows, and translated into service-token headers for backend and ai-backend; BYOK provider keys ride the same trust lanes. Verification is genuinely shared between dev and prod, but the HMAC path never checks exp, the session-binding kill-switch is enabled nowhere, and the bearer codec / SIWE template / dev-mint logic each exist in 2-3 hand-kept copies.

nodes.summary: Auth & Identity end-to-end: login ramps -> HMAC bearer -> facade verify + session touch -> service-header forwarding to backend and ai-backend; desktop posture and BYOK key distribution included.

edges.label: auth surface: GET /v1/auth/session probe, POST /v1/auth/{login,siwe/*,mfa/*,logout}, dev auto-mint POST /v1/dev/identity/mint on 401
KeyValueStore + SecretStorage ports for persona slug and bearer persistence
EIP-6963 wallet discovery + personal_sign of the EIP-4361 message
auth proxying: /internal/v1/auth/{sessions/touch,oidc/*,siwe/*,saml/*,local/verify,magic-link/*,mfa/*,api-keys/verify} + dev IdP proxy /v1/dev/*
forwards verified identity as x-enterprise-* service headers on every agent route
copilot_service_contracts: header names + bearer claim names + REQUIRE_SESSION_BINDING env
copilot_service_contracts.auth_claims for sid/exp/org/user claim names
copilot_service_contracts.headers for the trusted service-header envelope
OIDC code exchange + JWKS against pinned Google endpoints; provider synthesized from GOOGLE_OAUTH_CLIENT_ID env
GET /internal/v1/policies/runtime returns decrypted BYOK provider_keys over the service-token lane
ProviderKeysHydrator re-fetches decrypted BYOK keys after run-context deserialization
sign-in ramps: /v1/dev/identity/mint (dev), /v1/auth/oidc/google/{start,callback}, /v1/auth/siwe/{nonce,verify}, wallet.html, /v1/me/profile claims
system browser opens Google auth_url; loopback server receives ?state&code redirect
local login signs SIWE with a per-install viem secp256k1 key (chain 4663); wallet login delegates to browser wallet
CLI sets COPILOT_PRODUCTION=1 so production posture holds despite app.isPackaged=false
supervisor injects per-install ENTERPRISE_AUTH_SECRET/SERVICE_TOKEN, SIWE_ORIGIN=facade origin, FACADE_WEB_DIST_DIR, *_ENVIRONMENT=production
serves the built frontend wallet.html + assets same-origin for the desktop SIWE handoff (FACADE_WEB_DIST_DIR)
@0x-copilot/api-types payload shapes for SIWE/auth responses
self-host compose pins BACKEND_ENVIRONMENT=production + ENTERPRISE_AUTH_SECRET/SERVICE_TOKEN + SIWE_ORIGIN/SIWE_ALLOWED_CHAIN_IDS
RUNTIME_ENVIRONMENT=production + ENTERPRISE_SERVICE_TOKEN fail-closed gate
sessions / siwe nonces / oidc state / provider-key rows via identity stores (revocation + expiry enforced at the store)
setup guides mirror the env contract (google-oauth-setup.md, wallet-login.md, dev-testing.md)
